# fluttersdk_telescope

> Runtime inspector for Flutter and Dart apps. Watch HTTP requests, logs, exceptions, model lifecycle, cache operations, events, authorization gates, and database queries via 9 watchers, 6 CLI commands, and 9 MCP tools.

Debug-time plugin for Dart 3.4+ Flutter apps. Surfaces live HTTP, logging, exception, and Magic framework state streams via `telescope:tail`, `telescope:requests`, `telescope:queries`, `telescope:caches` CLI commands and 9 MCP tool surfaces for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf).

## Docs
- [Installation](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/getting-started/installation.md)
- [Quickstart](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/getting-started/quickstart.md)
- [Watchers overview](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/index.md)
- [HTTP watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/http.md)
- [Log watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/log.md)
- [Exception watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/exception.md)
- [Magic Model watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/magic-model.md)
- [Magic Cache watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/magic-cache.md)
- [Event watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/event.md)
- [Gate watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/gate.md)
- [Dump watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/dump.md)
- [Query watcher](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/watchers/query.md)
- [MCP overview](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/mcp/overview.md)
- [MCP setup](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/mcp/setup.md)
- [MCP tool reference](https://fluttersdk.com/telescope/mcp/tool-reference.md)
